title: Create Risk Score
description: Define a new clinical risk score model by selecting predictors, specifying the outcome, and configuring model parameters. Parthenon supports CHADS2-VASc, Charlson Comorbidity Index, and custom logistic regression models.
tips: Start with a validated clinical scoring system (CHADS2-VASc, Charlson) before creating custom models.
Specify your observation window — the time period before the index date used to collect predictor values.
Include both continuous and categorical predictors; Parthenon handles encoding automatically.
Use the cohort selector to apply your risk score to a specific patient population defined in the Cohort Builder.
